hyperedges.label: SQLAlchemy ORM Model Hierarchy (Document → Chunk + Conversation → Message)
Full RAG Pipeline: ingestion → retrieval → rerank → chat
Semantic Cache Integration: embed_query → cache lookup → retrieval bypass
Background Ingest: ARQ worker vs BackgroundTasks path both call ingest_document
RAG Retrieval Pipeline: Hybrid BM25 + Semantic + RRF + FlashRank
Benchmark Suite: Five Performance Dimensions Measured
Critical Bugs: SSE Newline Drop + None Content + Event Loop Block

nodes.label: Float16 Embedding Storage Design Decision
nodes.rationale: Embeddings stored as float16 bytes (BLOB) to reduce storage footprint. Auto-detected on load by byte length (len == dim*2 => float16, else float32). Negligible cosine-sim loss documented.

nodes.label: Plan Mode Default Convention
nodes.rationale: Enter plan mode for any non-trivial task (3+ steps or architectural decisions) to reduce ambiguity and prevent runaway implementation.

nodes.label: Hybrid Retrieval (BM25 + Semantic + RRF)
nodes.rationale: BM25 sparse retrieval combined with dense cosine similarity and fused via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (k=60) to outperform either method alone on recall.

nodes.label: HyDE (Hypothetical Document Embedding)
nodes.rationale: Optionally embeds a hypothetical answer generated by LLM instead of the raw question to improve semantic search on vague queries. Disabled by default.

nodes.label: Two-Layer Retrieval Cache (L1 LRU + L2 Redis)
nodes.rationale: L1 in-process LRU (cachetools maxsize=50) keeps hot documents in-process; L2 Redis shares cache across instances for horizontal scaling.
nodes.norm_label: two-layer retrieval cache (l1 lru + l2 redis)

nodes.label: Background Ingestion (BackgroundTasks or ARQ)
nodes.rationale: Upload returns immediately; browser polls until document is ready. Uses FastAPI BackgroundTasks by default; switches to ARQ when REDIS_URL is set.
